004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
024
025/**
026 * Specialized writer for serializing Hjson format.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Extends {@link SerializerWriter} with Hjson-specific methods for quoteless strings,
030 * multiline strings, and formatting options.
031 *
032 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
033 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://hjson.github.io/syntax.html">Hjson Specification</a>
034 * </ul>
035 */
036@SuppressWarnings({
037   "java:S135",  // Multiple break/continue necessary for isNumber char validation loop
038   "resource"    // Writer resource managed by calling code
039})
040public class HjsonWriter extends SerializerWriter {
041
042   private static final AsciiSet QUOTE_KEY_CHARS = AsciiSet.of(" \t\n\r{},:[]\"'#/");
043   private static final AsciiSet QUOTE_VALUE_CHARS = AsciiSet.of("\n\r{},:\"'#");
044   private static final AsciiSet ENCODED_CHARS = AsciiSet.of("\n\t\b\f\r\"\\");
045
046   /** Use newlines instead of commas between members. */
047   protected final boolean useNewlineSeparators;
048
049   /** Use quoteless strings for simple values. */
050   protected final boolean useQuotelessStrings;
051
052   /** Use quoteless keys when safe. */
053   protected final boolean useQuotelessKeys;
054
055   /** Omit root braces. */
056   protected final boolean omitRootBraces;
057
058   /** Use multiline ''' for strings with newlines. */
059   protected final boolean useMultilineStrings;
060
061   /** Whether to add space after colon. */
062   protected final boolean spacedKeyValueSeparator;
063
064   /**
065    * Constructor.
066    *
067    * @param out The writer being wrapped.
068    * @param useWhitespace If <jk>true</jk>, use indentation and newlines.
069    * @param maxIndent The maximum indentation level.
070    * @param trimStrings If <jk>true</jk>, trim strings before serialization.
071    * @param useNewlineSeparators Use newlines instead of commas.
072    * @param useQuotelessStrings Use quoteless strings for simple values.
073    * @param useQuotelessKeys Use quoteless keys when safe.
074    * @param omitRootBraces Omit root object braces.
075    * @param useMultilineStrings Use ''' for multiline strings.
076    * @param spacedKeyValueSeparator Add space after colon.
077    * @param uriResolver The URI resolver.
078    */
079   @SuppressWarnings({
080      "java:S107" // Constructor requires many parameters for Hjson writer configuration
081   })
082   protected HjsonWriter(Writer out, boolean useWhitespace, int maxIndent, boolean trimStrings,
083         boolean useNewlineSeparators, boolean useQuotelessStrings, boolean useQuotelessKeys,
084         boolean omitRootBraces, boolean useMultilineStrings, boolean spacedKeyValueSeparator,
085         UriResolver uriResolver) {
086      super(out, useWhitespace, maxIndent, trimStrings, '"', uriResolver);
087      this.useNewlineSeparators = useNewlineSeparators;
088      this.useQuotelessStrings = useQuotelessStrings;
089      this.useQuotelessKeys = useQuotelessKeys;
090      this.omitRootBraces = omitRootBraces;
091      this.useMultilineStrings = useMultilineStrings;
092      this.spacedKeyValueSeparator = spacedKeyValueSeparator;
093   }
094
095   /**
096    * Writes member separator (newline or comma).
097    *
098    * @param depth The current indentation depth.
099    * @return This object.
100    */
101   public HjsonWriter memberSeparator(int depth) {
102      if (useNewlineSeparators) {
103         nl(depth);
104      } else {
105         w(',');
106      }
107      return this;
108   }
109
110   /**
111    * Writes key-value separator (: or : ).
112    *
113    * @return This object.
114    */
115   public HjsonWriter keyValueSeparator() {
116      if (spacedKeyValueSeparator)
117         w(": ");
118      else
119         w(':');
120      return this;
121   }
122
123   /**
124    * Writes object start, optionally omitting braces.
125    *
126    * @param omitBraces If <jk>true</jk>, omit the opening brace.
127    * @param depth The current indentation depth.
128    * @return This object.
129    */
130   public HjsonWriter objectStart(boolean omitBraces, int depth) {
131      if (!omitBraces)
132         w('{');
133      return this;
134   }
135
136   /**
137    * Writes object end, optionally omitting braces.
138    *
139    * @param omitBraces If <jk>true</jk>, omit the closing brace.
140    * @param depth The current indentation depth.
141    * @return This object.
142    */
143   public HjsonWriter objectEnd(boolean omitBraces, int depth) {
144      if (!omitBraces)
145         w('}');
146      return this;
147   }
148
149   /**
150    * Writes array start.
151    *
152    * @return This object.
153    */
154   public HjsonWriter arrayStart() {
155      w('[');
156      return this;
157   }
158
159   /**
160    * Writes array end.
161    *
162    * @return This object.
163    */
164   public HjsonWriter arrayEnd() {
165      w(']');
166      return this;
167   }
168
169   /**
170    * Returns whether the key needs quoting.
171    *
172    * @param key The key to check.
173    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the key must be quoted.
174    */
175   public boolean needsQuoting(String key) {
176      if (key == null || key.isEmpty())
177         return true;
178      if (!useQuotelessKeys)
179         return true;
180      for (var i = 0; i < key.length(); i++) {
181         if (QUOTE_KEY_CHARS.contains(key.charAt(i)))
182            return true;
183      }
184      return "true".equals(key) || "false".equals(key) || "null".equals(key) || isNumber(key);
185   }
186
187   /**
188    * Returns whether the value can be written as quoteless.
189    *
190    * @param value The value to check.
191    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the value can be quoteless.
192    */
193   public boolean isSimpleValue(String value) {
194      if (value == null || value.isEmpty())
195         return false;
196      if (!useQuotelessStrings)
197         return false;
198      if (value.startsWith("{") || value.startsWith("[") || value.startsWith("\"") || value.startsWith("'"))
199         return false;
200      if (value.startsWith("#") || value.startsWith("//") || value.startsWith("/*"))
201         return false;
202      if (value.contains("\n") || value.contains("\r"))
203         return false;
204      for (var i = 0; i < value.length(); i++) {
205         if (QUOTE_VALUE_CHARS.contains(value.charAt(i)))
206            return false;
207      }
208      if ("true".equals(value) || "false".equals(value) || "null".equals(value))
209         return false;
210      return !isNumber(value);
211   }
212
213   private static boolean isNumber(String s) {
214      if (s == null || s.isEmpty())
215         return false;
216      var i = s.startsWith("-") ? 1 : 0;
217      if (i >= s.length())
218         return false;
219      if (s.charAt(i) == '0' && s.length() > i + 1 && s.charAt(i + 1) != '.')
220         return false;
221      for (; i < s.length(); i++) {
222         var c = s.charAt(i);
223         if (c >= '0' && c <= '9')
224            continue;
225         if (c == '.' || c == 'e' || c == 'E' || c == '+' || c == '-')
226            continue;
227         return false;
228      }
229      try {
230         Double.parseDouble(s);
231         return true;
232      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
233         return false;
234      }
235   }
236
237   /**
238    * Writes a quoteless string value.
239    *
240    * @param value The value to write.
241    * @return This object.
242    */
243   public HjsonWriter quotelessString(String value) {
244      if (value != null)
245         w(value);
246      return this;
247   }
248
249   /**
250    * Writes a quoted string with JSON escaping.
251    *
252    * @param value The value to write.
253    * @return This object.
254    */
255   public HjsonWriter quotedString(String value) {
256      if (value == null) {
257         w("null");
258         return this;
259      }
260      w('"');
261      for (var i = 0; i < value.length(); i++) {
262         var c = value.charAt(i);
263         if (ENCODED_CHARS.contains(c)) {
264            w('\\');
265            w(switch (c) {
266               case '\n' -> 'n';
267               case '\t' -> 't';
268               case '\b' -> 'b';
269               case '\f' -> 'f';
270               case '\r' -> 'r';
271               case '"' -> '"';
272               case '\\' -> '\\';
273               default -> c;
274            });
275         } else {
276            w(c);
277         }
278      }
279      w('"');
280      return this;
281   }
282
283   /**
284    * Writes a multiline string using ''' syntax.
285    *
286    * @param value The value to write.
287    * @return This object.
288    */
289   public HjsonWriter multilineString(String value) {
290      if (value == null) {
291         w("null");
292         return this;
293      }
294      w("'''");
295      w(value.replace("\r\n", "\n").replace("\r", "\n"));
296      w("'''");
297      return this;
298   }
299
300   // Override return types for chaining
301   @Override public HjsonWriter append(char c) { super.append(c); return this; }
302   @Override public HjsonWriter append(char[] value) { super.append(value); return this; }
303   @Override public HjsonWriter append(int indent, char c) { super.append(indent, c); return this; }
304   @Override public HjsonWriter append(int indent, String text) { super.append(indent, text); return this; }
305   @Override public HjsonWriter append(Object text) { super.append(text); return this; }
306   @Override public HjsonWriter append(String text) { super.append(text); return this; }
307   @Override public HjsonWriter appendIf(boolean b, char c) { super.appendIf(b, c); return this; }
308   @Override public HjsonWriter appendIf(boolean b, String text) { super.appendIf(b, text); return this; }
309   @Override public HjsonWriter appendln(int indent, String text) { super.appendln(indent, text); return this; }
310   @Override public HjsonWriter appendln(String text) { super.appendln(text); return this; }
311   @Override public HjsonWriter appendUri(Object value) { super.appendUri(value); return this; }
312   @Override public HjsonWriter cr(int depth) { super.cr(depth); return this; }
313   @Override public HjsonWriter cre(int depth) { super.cre(depth); return this; }
314   @Override public HjsonWriter i(int indent) { super.i(indent); return this; }
315   @Override public HjsonWriter ie(int indent) { super.ie(indent); return this; }
316   @Override public HjsonWriter nl(int indent) { super.nl(indent); return this; }
317   @Override public HjsonWriter nlIf(boolean flag, int indent) { super.nlIf(flag, indent); return this; }
318   @Override public HjsonWriter q() { super.q(); return this; }
319   @Override public HjsonWriter s() { super.s(); return this; }
320   @Override public HjsonWriter sIf(boolean flag) { super.sIf(flag); return this; }
321   @Override public HjsonWriter w(char value) { super.w(value); return this; }
322   @Override public HjsonWriter w(String value) { super.w(value); return this; }
323}
